payload.title: MTA Board Action Items

payload.claim_text: LIRR is running another 300 additional trains per weekday -- the 40% service increase.
payload.subject: LIRR

payload.claim_text: The commuter railroads are averaging 96% on-time performance.
payload.subject: LIRR and Metro-North

payload.claim_text: Paratransit is at 92% on-time performance, 20% ridership growth and 79% customer satisfaction.
payload.subject: MTA Paratransit

payload.claim_text: The Station Re-NEW-vation program ... improving 63 stations so far and another 50 stations planned for 2024.
payload.subject: MTA Station Re-NEW-vation program

payload.claim_text: MTA was required to achieve $400 million in cost-saving efficiencies starting this year, and the agency is exceeding its goal and is on track to save $500 million by 2025, all without layoffs or service reductions.
payload.subject: MTA

payload.description: Certified Women Owned Business Enterprise (WBE) providing engineering consulting services
Majority owner of Birrialandia Corp.

payload.claim_text: MTA C&D is executing projects on budget and on schedule: Third Track project $100 million under budget; L train project finished three months early, $100 million under budget and no shutdown required; 25 ADA projects in last three years with $250 million in savings; Penn Station concourse $700 million project on time and on budget; first contract awarded for Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 with $1.3 billion in cost savings; Grand Central Madison opened for one year with 17 million customers.
With all the extra service, the MTA is still spending 3% less than before COVID.

tool_args.label: NYCT Public Transportation Agency Safety Plans Approval

payload.claim_text: The MTA Chief Safety Officer in coordination with New York City Transit submitted the 2023 Department of Subways (DOS) and Department of Buses (DOB) Public Transportation Agency Safety Plans (PTASP) for MTA Board review and approval. The Board approved the 2023 PTASPs for Department of Subways and Department of Buses.
